stemHtml: An aircraft experiences radio communication failure on an IFR flight in IMC. It shall land, If possible, within…

options.a: 15 minutes after crossing the designated navigation fix from which a normal Instrument approach can be conducted.
options.b: 15 minutes of the ETA as stated in the current IF flight plan, or hold at a designated navigation fix.
options.c: 10 minutes after the ETA or the last acknowledged Expected Approach Time, whichever is later.
options.d: 30 minutes after the ETA or the last acknowledged Expected Approach Time, whichever is later.
